zh.Artois, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯阿托斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin於大約1075年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，他的父親Hugues II de Ponthieu32歲，母親Helissende de Montreuil27歲。他和Beatrix de St.Pol至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1144年在他的家鄉享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin于大约1075年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，他的父亲Hugues II de Ponthieu32岁，母亲Helissende de Montreuil27岁。他和Beatrix de St.Pol至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1144年在他的家乡享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: dit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Munir, Riaz, Akbar, Anwar, Ashraf, Ghulam, Mohammad, Salah, Shahid, Tariq, Zahir, Abdul.  Indian Amrit, Gulab, Hemant, Jitendra, Mohi, Neena, Shingara.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan): from the Arabic personal name Dīn, from dīn ‘religion’, or a shortened form of any of the many Arabic names formed with the same word, for example Saifuddin ‘sword of religion’ or Salahuddin ‘righteousness of religion’.

variants.name: Dinn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Dinh, Hoa, Trang.
Irish (Tipperary): probably a variant of Scottish Din 6, from a short form of the personal name Dinis, a variant of Dennis .

variants.name: Diner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Efim, Igor, Lev, Mikhail, Semyon, Yevgeniy.  Jewish Avi, Izrael, Mordecai, Yehuda.  German Frieda, Gitta.

variants.name: Ding
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Li, Yan, Feng, Hong, Ning, Wen, Chen, Hui, Jin, Min, Yuan, Zheng, Chong, Joo, Yeo, You.

Chinese: Mandarin or Cantonese form of the surname 丁, meaning ‘male adult’ or ‘population’ in Chinese: (i) from Qi Ding Gong (齊丁公, Duke Ding of Qi), posthumous title of Jiang Ji, son of Jiang Ziya or Jiang Tai Gong (c. 11th century BC , an official who lived during the Western Zhou dynasty). (ii) from the personal name of Ding Hou (丁侯), meaning ‘Marquis Ding’, title of an official during the late Shang dynasty (1600–1046 BC ). (iii) from the personal name of Ding Kuang (丁匡), originally called Sun Kuang, a grandson of Sun Quan (182–252 AD ). Sun Quan was the king of the state of Wu (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangsu provinces) during the Three Kingdoms period (220–280 AD ). His change of surname was ordered by his grandfather, whose displeasure he had incurred. (iv) from the personal name of Ding Qing (丁慶), a person in the Northern Song dynasty (960–1127 AD ), who changed his original name Yu to Ding (丁). (v) the surname was also brought to China by immigrants from Central Asia. (vi) it can also be traced back to other minority ethnic groups, such as the Shanyue group in southeastern China, the Xianbei group in northern China, and certain other groups in southwestern China.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄧, based on its Teochew, Hokkien, or Taiwanese pronunciation. See   Deng  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugues
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Hugues Capet ( ?938–96 ) was ruler of France ( 987–96 ) and founder of the Capetian dynasty. See Hugh .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin was born about 1075, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Hugues II de Ponthieu, was 32 and his mother, Helissende de Montreuil, was 27. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Beatrix de St.Pol. He died about 1144, in his hometown, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin est né environ 1075, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Hugues II de Ponthieu, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Helissende de Montreuil, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Beatrix de St.Pol. Il est décédé environ 1144, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin um 1075 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues II de Ponthieu 32 und seine Mutter Helissende de Montreuil 27. Er hatte mit Beatrix de St.Pol mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1144 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin è nato il circa 1075 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues II de Ponthieu, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Helissende de Montreuil, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Beatrix de St.Pol. Morì circa 1144, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdinが約1075年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Hugues II de Ponthieuは32歳，母Helissende de Montreuilは27歳であった。彼はBeatrix de St.Polとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1144年に故郷で71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin(이)가 대략 1075년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II de Ponthieu(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Helissende de Montreuil(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Beatrix de St.Pol(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1144년 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1075–about 1144: tany ho any amin'ny 1075–tany ho any amin'ny 1144

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin nasceu aproximadamente 1075, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Hugues II de Ponthieu, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Helissende de Montreuil, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Beatrix de St.Pol. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1144, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin родился около 1075 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues II de Ponthieu было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Helissende de Montreuil, 27. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Beatrix de St.Pol. Он умер около 1144 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год.

sm.about 1075–about 1144: e tusa o le 1075–e tusa o le 1144

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugues III dit Candavène , Comte de St. Pol, Comte de Hesdin nació aproximadamente 1075, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Hugues II de Ponthieu, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Helissende de Montreuil, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Beatrix de St.Pol. Murió aproximadamente 1144, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años.
